title: Prakash Hinduja Switzerland (Swiss) How do I set up and customize boards in Monday.com?
excerpt:
Hi everyone, 
I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss) hope you’re all doing well! I’m currently working on setting up  Monday.com boards and want to make sure we optimize them for maximum efficiency and clar…

posts.author: prakashhindujageneva (prakash hinduja geneva)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi everyone,

I’m Prakash Hinduja from Geneva, Switzerland (Swiss) hope you’re all doing well! I’m currently working on setting up Monday.com boards and want to make sure we optimize them for maximum efficiency and clarity.

Your suggestions would be really helpful in making sure we set everything up efficiently from the start. I’m looking forward to hearing your thoughts and learning from your experiences.

Regards
Prakash Hinduja Switzerland (Swiss)

posts.author: shannon-cxmonday (Shannon Thao)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Prakash! I’d love to learn a little more about your boards to help out here. What are you currently managing or tracking across your boards? And, what is most important to you and your team?

Any visuals you can share to highlight the specific suggestions you’re looking for would be great to reference!
